top_signals.title: New PM cuts tax on household electricity bills to give breathing space on cost of living
top_signals.summary: New Prime Minister takes immediate action to cut taxes on electricity bills to give millions of households breathing space this winter.

top_signals.title: Berenberg discovers accounting manipulation designed to flatter profits
top_signals.summary: Auditor signs off delayed 2025 accounts, showing net profit fell from €81.6mn to €20.2mn

top_signals.title: Six things we learnt from the new prime minister’s choices for his top team
top_signals.summary: New leader signals he will depart from Keir Starmer’s approach in some areas while stressing continuity in others

top_signals.title: Washington judge blocks Kalshi’s sports prediction markets over state gambling laws
top_signals.summary: A Washington state court granted the state's motion for a preliminary injunction, saying Kalshi operates illegal gambling activities.
